message.entry: No constructor found for MATLAB class {0}.
The array was not recognized as a Scalar, Vector, or higher dimensional array.
{0} cannot be read. The input must be a list of valid package names, class names, or function names on the path.
Unable to write generated CPP code to the specified file: {0}.
Method {0} has no input arguments. Non-Static MATLAB methods require at least one input argument.
No meta-data found for the input arguments in method {0}. Verify the method has a valid arguments block.
Variable number of input arguments in method {0} is not supported.
Arguments for method {0} have missing meta-data. Verify the method has a valid arguments block.
Input argument in position {0} of method "{1}" does not have a MATLAB type specified. Consider adding type validation data to the method definition.
Input argument in position {0} of method "{1}" does not have a size/dimension specified. Consider adding size validation data to the method definition.
No meta-data found for the input arguments in function {0}. Verify the function has a valid arguments block.
Variable number of input arguments in function {0} is not supported.
Arguments for function {0} have missing meta-data. Verify the function has a valid arguments block.
Input argument in position {0} of function "{1}" does not have a MATLAB type specified. Consider adding type validation data to the function definition.
Input argument in position {0} of function "{1}" does not have a size/dimension specified. Consider adding size validation data to the function definition.
The CPP Code Generator has encountered an internal logic error. Please report this error to MathWorks technical support.
No meta-data detected for property "{0}" in class "{1}". Verify the properties block for this class is valid.
No size or class meta-data detected for property "{0}" in class "{1}". Consider adding validation data to this property in its definition.
No size meta-data detected for property "{0}" in class "{1}". Consider adding size validation data to this property in its definition.
No class/type meta-data detected for property "{0}" in class "{1}". Consider adding class/type validation data to this property in its definition.
Argument in "{0}" has invalid dimensions. Verify the arguments block for "{0}" is valid.
Enums are not supported for conversion.
Detected unresolved class dependencies. Generate or provide the following classes, or generated code may not build: {0}
Class {0} needs to access protected members of {1} in the CPP generation, but class {1} could not be found. Generate or provide, class {1}, or generated code may not build.
The following method(s) in MATLAB class {0} will not be generated: {1}. Method name conflicts with a property access method.
The following property access methods in class {0} will not be generated: {1}. The property access method name(s) conflict with the class name.
MATLAB token(s) will not be generated due to C++ keyword name conflict. Rename the following token(s) to prevent possible build or runtime errors in generated C++ code: {0}.
To avoid C++ keyword conflicts, these MATLAB method argument name(s) will be modified in generated C++ code: {0}.
To avoid C++ keyword conflicts, these MATLAB function argument name(s) will be modified in generated C++ code: {0}.
Built-in method {0} not supported.
Built-in function {0} not supported.
At least one input list of Packages, Classes, or Functions must be provided in name-value pair format.
Input list is invalid type. The list must be a string array.
Invalid input package names: {0}. Names must be valid packages on the MATLAB search path.
Invalid input class names: {0}. Names must be valid classes on the MATLAB search path.
Invalid input function names: {0}. Names must be valid functions on the MATLAB search path.
File containing method {0} definition not found.
File containing function {0} definition not found.
Input arguments for {0} not determined. The function or method must be compatible with nargin.
